content.full_text:
February 5, 1990

Marge Gibson Haskell
Councilmember, District 1
City Hall
One City Hall Plaza
Oakland, CA 94612

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. A-90-036

Dear Ms. Haskell:

You have requested confirmation of telephone advice provided to you concerning the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act. (Government Code Sections 81000-91015.)

Your letter, dated January 4, 1990, correctly summarizes my advice. Contributions or independent expenditures made to or on behalf of other candidates, officeholders, or committees by your spouse do not need to be reported by you provided they are from his own funds. However, if he made contributions or independent expenditures from community property funds, you are required to report them on the allocation page of your campaign statement.

A copy of your letter is enclosed for your convenience.

Please contact me at (916) 322-5662 if you have any additional questions.

Sincerely,

Kathryn E. Donovan
General Counsel

By: Wayne P. Imberi
Political Reform Consultant
